onboarding.title: Welcome to the Spec Builder
onboarding.subtitle: A clear, five-step process to help you define your product without overwhelm.
what_to_expect: The system will reflect your answers back with more clarity.
No features will be added or invented.
You’ll receive a clean, build-ready spec at the end.

what.title: Step 1: What Are You Building?
what.helper: Describe your product in one or two sentences. Keep it simple. No need for technical details.

who.title: Step 2: Who Is It For?
who.helper: Describe the primary user. If there’s a secondary user, you can include them too.

how.title: Step 3: How Does It Work?
how.helper: List the steps a user takes from start to finish. Keep it chronological and simple.

when.title: Step 4: When Do They Use It?
when.helper: Describe the moment or trigger that causes the user to take action.

with.title: Step 5: What Tools Do You Need?
with.helper: List any tools, resources, or platforms you believe are required.

errors.missing_input: Please enter a response before continuing.
errors.too_vague: This needs a bit more clarity. Try adding one more detail.
errors.invalid_format: The format doesn’t match what this step requires.

confirmation.title: Your Spec Is Ready
confirmation.message: Your answers have been refined, aligned with the Mirror Protocol, and validated for clarity. You can now download your build-ready specification.
